L1.head: integration of dielectric gradient metamaterials with tailored refractive index profile
L1.tail: fundamental redefinition of wavefront manipulation in THz optics
L1.claim: 集成介电梯度超材料与定制折射率剖面重新定义THz光学波前操控

L1.head: spatially variant dispersion compensation
L1.tail: simultaneous suppression of chromatic aberration and diffraction-limited resolution
L1.claim: 空间变化的色散补偿同时抑制色差并实现衍射极限分辨率

L1.head: multi-frequency phase coherence
L1.claim: 多频相位相干性在0.2–0.9 THz带宽实现消色差超分辨率

L1.head: radial symmetry of refractive index gradient
L1.tail: field of view through phase consistency at oblique angles
L1.claim: 折射率梯度径向对称性通过倾斜角相位一致性扩展视场

L2.head: dielectric gradient metamaterial
L2.tail: compensatory group delay dispersion at distinct radial positions
L2.claim: 介电梯度超材料在不同径向位置产生补偿性群延迟色散

L2.head: spatially varying dispersion
L2.tail: constructive interference at single focal point across frequencies
L2.claim: 空间变化色散诱导多频下单焦点相长干涉

L2.head: subwavelength meta-atom heterogeneity
L2.claim: 亚波长元原子异质性增强倏逝波耦合实现超分辨率

L2.head: multi-material 3D printing
L2.tail: precise spatial control of dielectric meta-atoms
L2.claim: 多材料3D打印实现介电元原子精确空间控制

L2.head: tuning polymer composition and infill density
L2.claim: 调控聚合物成分和填充密度创建平滑折射率梯度

L2.head: layer-wise fabrication
L2.claim: 层状制造通过整体集成减少界面散射

L2.head: anisotropic print parameters
L2.claim: 各向异性打印参数优化电磁响应实现偏振无关成像
